package rulecoverage

func PositiveToctouFileCheckThenOpen() string {
    ruleID := "toctou_file_check_then_open"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`os.Stat(path)` or file existence check followed by `os.Open(path)` or `os.Create(path)` without atomic operations"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
